shadcn-html v0.1.0
GitHub

Overview

Introduction Token System Setup agents.md

Components

Button Dialog Sheet Card Accordion Tabs Dropdown Toast Combobox Toggle

shadcn-html / accordion

No JS *

Accordion

Collapsible content sections built on native <details> / <summary>. Multi-open needs zero JS. Single-open adds a small toggle handler.

Multi-open (zero JS)

Is it accessible?

Yes. It uses native HTML details/summary elements which are fully accessible by default. Screen reader and keyboard support are built in.

Is it styled?

Yes. It follows the shadcn/ui token system for consistent theming across light and dark modes.

Is it animated?

Yes. Uses ::details-content with calc-size(auto, size) for smooth height animation. The chevron rotates via CSS transition.

Single-open (JS closes siblings)

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, AmEx), PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.

Can I cancel my subscription?

Yes, you can cancel at any time from your account settings. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period.

Do you offer team pricing?

Yes. Teams of 5 or more get a 20% discount. Contact our sales team for custom enterprise plans with dedicated support.

patterns/accordion.md

Native basis

<details> / <summary>. Browser provides toggle, keyboard, and screen reader support natively.

Behavior modes

multi-openDefault. Any number open. Zero JS. data-type="single"One at a time. JS closes siblings on toggle. data-collapsibleWith single — allows all to be closed.

Animation

Uses ::details-content pseudo-element with block-size transition for smooth open/close.

@starting-style provides the enter animation. Chevron rotates 180deg via CSS.

Structure

.accordionflex column wrapper .accordion-item<details> — bottom border (except last) .accordion-trigger<summary> — full width, space-between .accordion-chevronSVG — rotates 180deg when open (CSS) .accordion-contentpadding-bottom, --muted-foreground

Keyboard

All native — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to toggle. No JS needed.

<!-- Multi-open (zero JS) -->
<div class="accordion">
  <details class="accordion-item" open>
    <summary class="accordion-trigger">
      <span>Question text</span>
      <svg class="accordion-chevron" aria-hidden="true"
           width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24"
           fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
        <path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/>
      </svg>
    </summary>
    <div class="accordion-content">
      <p>Answer content...</p>
    </div>
  </details>
  <!-- more items... -->
</div>

<!-- Single-open (JS closes siblings) -->
<div class="accordion" data-type="single">
  <!-- same item structure -->
</div>

<!-- Single-open + collapsible (all can be closed) -->
<div class="accordion" data-type="single" data-collapsible>
  <!-- same item structure -->
</div>
